event_blocks.summary: A man in a studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, introduces his goal to showcase the top 10 most useful GPTs from the official store, explaining that he tested over 100 GPTs over a week using many credits. He navigates the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs interface, searching for 'gpt finder' and displaying results, then shows a Google Sheets document titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, which he calls his 'knowledge base' containing top GPTs across various categories. Returning to the studio, he reiterates his process of narrowing down from over 20,000 GPTs. The screen recording resumes on the 'GPT Finder' configuration page, where he points out uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and sample prompts in a preview section, referring to them as his 'knowledge base' and 'different categories.' The video then transitions to a 'DOC MAKER' title card with a '10' logo, as the man announces 'Doc Maker' as the tenth item in his countdown. He demonstrates searching for 'doc maker' in the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, highlighting 'Doc Maker' by aidocmaker.com for its "over 25,000 chats." The Doc Maker GPT Interface loads, detailing its capabilities in Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, and Data Analysis, which the man explains is useful for GPT builders to communicate functions like creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints. The user requests a presentation on 'Generative AI,' and the GPT rapidly generates a modern slide deck, previewed in a browser tab with slides like 'Introduction to Generative AI,' confirming the man's creation of a PowerPoint using the GPT, which provided a link to the generated content.

GPT Finder Configuration Page.description: A ChatGPT interface showing the 'GPT Finder' setup with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge', a 'Preview' section with sample prompts, and a 'Capabilities' section. The Man in Studio refers to this as "GPT Finder" while explaining that the GPTs presented are hand-picked and tested for usefulness.

Google Sheets Document.description: A spreadsheet titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with columns for GPT Name, Icon, Category, Description, and Link, displayed in a browser window. The man refers to this as 'this entire document' and his 'knowledge base,' containing the top GPTs in all kinds of different categories.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with an informative and clear tone, using expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, narrating the functionality of GPTs and explicitly naming "GPT Finder" and "Doc Maker" while detailing their features and usage.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories, and a list of GPTs with icons and descriptions. The Man in Studio explains that this interface displays the number of chats/interactions for each GPT, highlighting the "over 25,000 chats" for Doc Maker as a measure of its popularity.

Presentation Preview.description: A browser-based presentation editor displaying slides with titles like 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?', featuring a clean, modern design with blue and gray color accents. The Man in Studio confirms that this presentation was generated as a PowerPoint by the Doc Maker GPT, accessible via a provided link.

Doc Maker GPT Interface.description: A specialized ChatGPT interface for creating documents, presentations, and spreadsheets, featuring a blue document icon, a description of its capabilities (Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, Data Analysis), and a text input field for user prompts. The Man in Studio describes this GPT as a tool capable of creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints, emphasizing its utility for builders to clearly communicate its functions.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a man, wearing a black polo shirt and a gray baseball cap, seated in a studio with blue lighting and tech gadgets, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He introduces his goal to show the top 10 most useful GPTs from the official GPT store, explaining in a clear, articulate male voice that it took him about a week and many credits to test over 100 different GPTs for this list. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs interface, where the man demonstrates searching for 'gpt finder' and displays multiple results. He then shows a Google Sheets document titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with icons, categories, descriptions, and links, which he refers to as 'this entire document' and his 'knowledge base' containing top GPTs in different categories. The video cuts back to the man, who continues explaining his process of narrowing down from over 20,000 GPTs to the top 100 most useful. The screen recording returns, showing the 'GPT Finder' configuration page with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge' and a preview section with sample prompts, which he identifies as 'my knowledge base' and 'different categories' from the document. Throughout the screen recordings, the man’s face appears in a small circular overlay, maintaining visual continuity as he explains the features and benefits of his curated GPTs.

The video opens with a screen recording of the GPT Finder Configuration Page, where the Man in Studio, visible in a circular overlay, speaks directly to the camera in an informative tone. He explains that the GPTs shown are hand-picked and tested for usefulness, referring to the interface as "GPT Finder." The scene then transitions to a 'DOC MAKER' title card with a stylized '10' logo, as the Man in Studio announces "Doc Maker" as the tenth item in an "official countdown." The video cuts to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio continues his narration, explaining that searching for a GPT, like 'doc maker' (which the user types into the search bar), reveals its interaction count. He highlights 'Doc Maker' by aidocmaker.com, noting its "over 25,000 chats" as a significant usage indicator. Upon selection, the Doc Maker GPT Interface loads, introducing itself with a detailed breakdown of its capabilities: Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, and Data Analysis. The Man in Studio elaborates on the utility of this introductory section for GPT builders, explaining it as a way to clearly communicate the GPT's functions, which include creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints. The user then requests a presentation on 'Generative AI,' and the GPT quickly generates a modern slide deck, previewed in a new browser tab with slides titled 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?'. The Man in Studio, gesturing expressively, confirms he created a PowerPoint using the GPT, which provided a link to the generated content.

event_blocks.summary: The Man in Studio, visible in a circular overlay, demonstrates the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, explaining how prompts generate editable documents convertible to audio or basic PowerPoint files. He then navigates to 'Super Describe', a GPT for image-to-prompt generation for DALL·E 3, uploading an architectural photo of an escalator to receive a detailed textual description. Transitioning to a live shot, the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo and gray cap in a studio with tech equipment and blue displays, emphasizes the need for detailed prompts in a well-lit environment. He returns to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface to showcase 'Prompt Perfect', a GPT with a colorful 'P' icon that enhances prompts for AI tools like DALL·E by adding detail, context, and structure, particularly beneficial for new users. He then introduces 'Logo Creator', a GPT with over 100,000 chats, identified by a blue 'L' icon. After searching for 'logo creator' within the GPTs Interface, he selects it and highlights its step-by-step, multiple-choice guidance for logo creation. The GPT prompts for design preferences, and 'Neutral' is selected. Subsequently, the 'Logo Creator' GPT generates nine logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' using a blue and gray palette, displaying them with a request for feedback, as the Man in Studio notes the provision of '16 different variations'.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, narrating with a clear, explanatory tone as he details the functions and benefits of various GPTs.

Prompt Perfect GPT.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a colorful circular icon with a stylized 'P', described by the Man in Studio as a tool designed to enhance and refine user prompts for AI image generation tools like DALL·E by adding necessary details and structure, making it ideal for new users.

Super Describe GPT.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a red circular icon with a stylized 'S', designed to generate detailed image prompts from uploaded photos using DALL·E 3, as demonstrated by the Man in Studio uploading an architectural photo and receiving a detailed textual description.

Presentation Preview.description: A browser-based presentation editor displaying slides with titles like 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?', featuring a clean, modern design with blue and gray color accents, which the Man in Studio demonstrates can be edited, converted to audio, and downloaded as a PowerPoint.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories like 'Top Picks' and 'Featured', and a list of GPTs with icons and descriptions, serving as the visual environment for the Man in Studio's spoken demonstrations and interactions.

Logo Creator GPT.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'L', described by the Man in Studio as a DALL·E tool that guides users through a step-by-step process with simple multiple-choice questions to generate logo designs based on user preferences and company details, capable of producing multiple variations like the 16 shown.

raw_segments: The video opens with a screen recording of a browser displaying a 'Applications of Generative AI' presentation, while the Man in Studio, speaking with a clear, informative male voice, appears in a circular overlay. He demonstrates the interface, explaining how prompts create editable documents that can be converted to audio or downloaded as a 'very basic PowerPoint' for a quick start. The scene then transitions to a live shot of the Man in Studio speaking directly to the camera, before cutting back to a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface. Here, he guides the viewer to 'Super Describe', a GPT he explains is for uploading images to get the right prompt for DALL·E 3. He uploads a black-and-white architectural photo of an escalator, and the GPT generates a detailed textual description, which he highlights as a great way to get a matching prompt. The Man in Studio then navigates to 'Prompt Perfect', another GPT, briefly introducing it before the audio cuts off.

The minute begins with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera in a well-lit studio environment with shelves of tech equipment and framed blue displays in the background. He gestures with his right hand as he explains that for better responses from ChatGPT, prompts often need more details, context, and structure. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the Man in Studio appears in a circular overlay in the top-left corner, continuing his narration. He demonstrates the 'Prompt Perfect' GPT, identified by its colorful 'P' icon, explaining that it enhances user prompts for AI tools like DALL·E by adding all the necessary elements to take them to the next level, making it a great tool for those new to prompting. He then introduces another DALL·E tool called 'Logo Creator', noting it has over 100,000 chats. The screen shifts to a search for 'logo creator' within the GPTs Interface, revealing a list of logo-related GPTs. The user selects the 'Logo Creator' GPT, identified by its blue 'L' icon, and the Man in Studio highlights how it walks users through a very step-by-step guide, asking easy, simple multiple-choice questions before creating the logo. The GPT asks for design preferences (Vibrant, Neutral, Serious), and the user selects 'B) Neutral'. The GPT then generates a grid of nine logo designs for 'Skill Leap AI' using a blue and gray color palette. The final screen displays these generated logos with a prompt asking for feedback, as the Man in Studio continues to narrate, expressing interest in the '16 different variations' it provided.

event_blocks.summary: The ChatGPT GPTs Interface displays the Logo Creator GPT, showcasing nine 'Skill Leap AI' logo designs in blue and grey, soliciting user feedback. A Man in Studio, in a black polo and grey cap, addresses the camera, praising the Logo Creator for generating numerous ideas and accurate text, but noting frequent typos and limitations with 'Dolly' in rendering text, advising users to experiment with prompts or request icon-only logos. The scene briefly shifts to the Man in Studio, seated in a blue-lit studio amidst tech gadgets, gesturing while speaking. Returning to the screen recording, the user navigates to the main ChatGPT GPTs page and selects the 'Creative Writing Coach' from 'Top Picks.' The Man in Studio highlights its impressive ability to provide feedback on user-written text to enhance creative writing skills. The Creative Writing Coach interface appears, prompting for feedback on a passage. The user then inputs a detailed sci-fi story, 'The Clockmaker of 2050,' describing a futuristic world with advanced technology, environmental collapse, and a character named Maya discovering a time-traveling device, as the Man in Studio explains his intention to seek feedback for improvement on this science fiction piece.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with a clear, explanatory voice and expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, providing commentary, advice, and demonstrations of the GPTs.

Logo Creator GPT.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'L', designed to generate logo designs based on user preferences and company details, which the Man in Studio critiques for its text generation capabilities and offers usage advice for.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories like 'Top Picks' and 'Featured', and a list of GPTs with icons and descriptions, which the Man in Studio navigates and discusses.

Creative Writing Coach.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'C', designed to provide feedback on creative writing and help improve writing skills, which the Man in Studio praises as "really impressive" and demonstrates by pasting a sci-fi story for feedback.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, displaying the Logo Creator GPT with nine distinct 'Skill Leap AI' logo designs in a blue and grey color palette, accompanied by a message asking for user feedback. A Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, is heard speaking directly to the camera in a clear, explanatory voice, noting how the Logo Creator "gives me ton of ideas" and generally "got the text right," though he points out "a lot of typos" and that "Dolly is not quite good yet at making text." He advises users to "play around with more prompts" or ask for an icon-only logo to add text elsewhere. The scene briefly cuts to a live shot of the Man in Studio, seated in a dimly lit studio with blue ambient lighting and shelves of tech gadgets, gesturing expressively as he continues to speak. The video then returns to the screen recording, showing the user hovering over one of the logos before transitioning to the main ChatGPT GPTs page. The user selects the 'Creative Writing Coach' from 'Top Picks,' which the Man in Studio introduces as "really impressive," explaining that "you could paste some text that you wrote and get feedback to improve your creative writing skills." The Creative Writing Coach loads, presenting a prompt for feedback on a writing passage, and the user proceeds to type a detailed sci-fi story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2050' into the input field, describing a futuristic world with advanced technology and environmental collapse, and a character named Maya who discovers a time-traveling device, as the Man in Studio states, "I'm just going to say give me some feedback to improve this and I pasted this text from a science fiction thing that I've been writing." The screen remains on the input field, awaiting a response.

event_blocks.summary: The ChatGPT GPTs Interface is showcased, initially featuring the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT, which the Man in Studio describes as offering superior, tailored feedback for creative writing, evidenced by a detailed analysis of a science fiction story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2090' displayed on screen, with strengths noted in premise, world-building, character, and theme. The user then navigates to 'Explore GPTs', searches for 'convert anything', and selects the 'Convert Anything' GPT. The Man in Studio introduces this popular GPT, used by over 10,000 users, highlighting its capability to convert various file types such as PNG to JPEG or WAV to MP3. A live shot shows the Man in Studio, dressed in a black polo and gray baseball cap, gesturing while explaining that the GPT utilizes ChatGPT's code interpreter for efficient conversions. The screen recording returns to the 'Convert Anything' interface, where a user uploads a PNG image of an escalator. The GPT processes the image, generating a download link for the converted JPEG file, and the Man in Studio's voice confirms the conversion by stating, "convert this PNG to JPEG," as the video ends with the successful conversion and download link visible.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He serves as the narrator and demonstrator, speaking with a clear, explanatory, and slightly enthusiastic American accent, providing commentary on the GPTs being shown.

Convert Anything.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a document and arrow symbol, designed to convert various file types. The Man in Studio's voice describes it as having over 10,000 users, capable of converting files like PNG to JPEG or WAV to MP3, and utilizing ChatGPT's code interpreter for its functionality.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories like 'Top Picks' and 'Featured', and a list of GPTs with icons and descriptions. In this segment, it displays the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT's feedback and then transitions to the 'Convert Anything' GPT's interface.

Creative Writing Coach.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'C', designed to provide feedback on creative writing and help improve writing skills. The Man in Studio's voice highlights its effectiveness in giving tailored feedback for creative writing.

raw_segments: The video opens with a screen recording of the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where a user is interacting with the 'Creative Writing Coach' GPT. The Man in Studio's voice explains that this GPT provides superior, tailored feedback for creative writing compared to standard ChatGPT, as the interface displays a detailed analysis of a science fiction story titled 'The Clockmaker of 2090', highlighting its strengths in premise, world-building, character, and theme. The user then navigates to the 'Explore GPTs' section and searches for 'convert anything', selecting the 'Convert Anything' GPT. The Man in Studio's voice introduces this GPT, noting its popularity with over 10,000 users and its ability to convert various file types like PNG to JPEG or WAV to MP3. A live shot shows the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo and gray baseball cap, gesturing as he elaborates on the GPT's functionality, explaining it leverages ChatGPT's code interpreter for seamless conversions. The screen recording reappears, showing the 'Convert Anything' interface. The user uploads a PNG image of an escalator, and the GPT processes it, generating a download link for the converted JPEG file. The Man in Studio's voice continues, demonstrating the conversion by stating, "convert this PNG to JPEG," as the video concludes with the successful conversion and download link displayed on screen.

event_blocks.summary: The ChatGPT GPTs Interface, in a dark theme, initially shows the 'Convert Anything' GPT processing a PNG to JPEG conversion, with the Man in Studio explaining the need for a website-ready file; the interface displays Python code and a 'Downloading...' status as the GPT utilizes a code interpreter. Subsequently, the Man in Studio introduces the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, noting its extensive chat history and transition from a plugin to a custom GPT, designed for creating diagrams for visual learners. The screen recording then scrolls through diverse diagram examples generated by this GPT, including Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear labels and visual distinctions. The Man in Studio highlights its effectiveness for mind maps, comparing it to Mac's Freeform but emphasizing the AI's speed, and promises further examples, while the interface retains its dark theme and user input field.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, providing clear, articulate commentary on the GPTs being demonstrated, explaining technical processes like file conversion via code interpreter, sharing usage statistics (over 25,000 chats for 'Diagrams: Show Me'), discussing the platform's evolution from plugins to custom GPTs, and elaborating on the utility of the diagram GPT for visual learning and mind mapping, even comparing it to other software.

Convert Anything.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a document and arrow symbol, designed to convert various file types. It is shown handling a PNG to JPEG conversion, providing a download link upon completion, and displaying Python code for the conversion process, which the Man in Studio explains is generated by a 'code interpreter' working in the background.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar, categories, and a list of GPTs. In this segment, it displays the 'Convert Anything' GPT's interface with Python code and download status, where a 'code interpreter' is used for conversion, then transitions to the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, which showcases various diagram types including Mermaid, PlantUML, Graphviz, and ErD examples with clear labels and visual representations, reflecting the platform's shift from plugins to custom GPTs.

Diagrams: Show Me.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a diagram symbol, designed to generate and display various types of diagrams. The Man in Studio highlights that it has over 25,000 chats, was a 'favorite plugin,' and is now a custom GPT, designed to create simple diagrams for visual learners, useful for teaching, and particularly good for mind maps, offering a quick AI-powered alternative to other tools. It showcases examples of Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear visual representations and labels for each type.

raw_segments: The video begins with a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where the 'Convert Anything' GPT is actively processing a file conversion request. The Man in Studio, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, explains that he needs to convert a PNG file for a website, and the interface displays Python code for converting a PNG to JPEG, showing a 'Downloading...' status as the GPT uses a code interpreter in the background to write the conversion code, providing a direct link for the JPEG. The interface then transitions to the 'Diagrams: Show Me' GPT, which the Man in Studio introduces as having over 25,000 chats and being a former 'favorite plugin,' now a custom GPT, reflecting the platform's shift away from plugins. He explains its purpose: to create simple diagrams for visual learners or for teaching, showcasing examples of various diagram types including Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams. The screen recording returns, scrolling through these diagram examples, highlighting Mermaid and PlantUML mindmaps, Graphviz, and ErD entity relationship diagrams with clear labels and visual differences. The Man in Studio emphasizes its utility for mind maps, comparing it to his use of Freeform on Mac, but highlighting this as a quick AI solution, promising more examples. The interface maintains its dark theme with clear, labeled examples and a text input field at the bottom for user interaction.

event_blocks.summary: The video begins with a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, showcasing 'Top Picks' like Consensus and AI PDF, while a Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap in a circular overlay, introduces Consensus and ScholarAI as favorites, highlighting their access to '200 million research documents'. The interface scrolls to ScholarAI, described as an 'AI Scientist'. Transitioning to a full-screen shot, the Man in Studio emphasizes the tools' value for research with expressive hand gestures. The interface returns, displaying ScholarAI's details. A gradient transition leads to 'INVIDEO AI 2'. The ChatGPT GPTs Interface reappears, displaying a search for 'Invideo AI' and related GPTs, as the Man in Studio introduces Invideo AI as a favorite that 'literally takes a single sentence'. The Man in Studio, again in a circular overlay, explains how a new ChatGPT GPT can create videos from text prompts, similar to Invideo AI. He searches for 'Invideo AI' and selects the 'Video AI by Invideo' GPT, requesting a YouTube video explaining generative AI to high school students. The GPT generates a link to 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students', transitioning to the dark-themed Invideo AI Platform after the Man in Studio clicks it. He explains the video isn't fully made yet, requiring an Invideo AI login, noting the free version's watermark. After logging in and selecting a workspace, the Invideo AI editor appears, displaying abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark and a timeline. The Man in Studio, now in a full-screen shot, concludes with expressive hand gestures, stating the system will generate a three-minute video with various scenes.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs. In this segment, it displays the 'Video AI by Invideo' GPT's interface after a search for 'Invideo AI'. The user types a prompt to 'create a YouTube video explaining generative AI to high school students', and the GPT responds with a 'Starting action' message, requests account access, and then provides a clickable link to a generated video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students'.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, providing clear, explanatory commentary in a conversational tone on the GPTs being demonstrated and the video creation process.

Invideo AI Platform.description: A dark-themed video creation platform, initially showing 'Join with Google' options. After the user clicks a link from ChatGPT, it displays a video generation progress bar, a workspace selection screen, and then a video editor. The editor features a preview of abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark, a timeline, and options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate', as the Man in Studio explains the final video generation process, including details about free vs. paid versions and watermarks.

raw_segments: The video opens with a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, showcasing 'Top Picks' including Consensus and AI PDF. A Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, appears in a circular overlay, his clear, enthusiastic male voice immediately heard as he introduces the GPTs, highlighting Consensus and ScholarAI as 'one of my favorite plugins'. He explains that these GPTs offer access to '200 million research documents' that ChatGPT alone cannot provide. The interface scrolls, focusing on ScholarAI, described as an 'AI Scientist'. The Man in Studio then transitions to a full-screen shot, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures, emphasizing that for 'any kind of research, these two are great tools'. The view returns to the interface, displaying ScholarAI's detailed description and sample prompts. A brief transition with a gradient background and the text 'INVIDEO AI' followed by '2' occurs. The ChatGPT GPTs Interface reappears, now showing a search for 'Invideo AI' and listing related GPTs like 'Video AI by Invideo' and 'Thumbnail maker by Invideo AI', as the Man in Studio's voice introduces Invideo AI as 'one of my favorite AI tools' that 'literally takes a single sentence'.

The video opens with the Man in Studio, visible in a circular overlay, explaining how a new ChatGPT GPT can create an entire video from a text prompt, similar to Invideo AI. He demonstrates this on the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, searching for 'Invideo AI' and selecting the 'Video AI by Invideo' GPT. He types a request to 'create a YouTube video explaining generative AI to high school students'. The GPT responds with a 'Starting action' message, requests and receives permission to access his account, and then generates a clickable link for a video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students'. The Man in Studio, continuing his clear, explanatory commentary, clicks the link, which transitions to the dark-themed Invideo AI Platform. He explains that while the link is provided, the video isn't fully made yet, requiring a login to Invideo AI, noting the free version includes a watermark. Having already logged in, he proceeds through the workspace selection, and the Invideo AI editor appears, displaying a preview of abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark and a timeline. The Man in Studio, now in a full-screen shot, uses expressive hand gestures to conclude, stating that the system will now generate the full video, which will be about three minutes long with various scenes.

event_blocks.summary: The Invideo AI Platform processes a video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students,' with the Man in Studio explaining its use of royalty-free Storyblocks for stock videos and narration, emphasizing full editability and the option to remove watermarks with a paid subscription. The ChatGPT GPTs Interface then shows a search for 'Invideo AI' and related GPTs, followed by the Man in Studio, now full-screen in a studio with blue lighting, introducing 'Automation Consultant by Zapier' for custom GPT automations. The interface displays the Zapier GPT with sample prompts, and the Man in Studio describes it as an 'automation consultant' offering 'good ideas.' A search for 'Canva' reveals related GPTs, but the Man in Studio clarifies that the Canva GPT, despite allowing 'thousands of messages,' primarily serves as a 'template tool or a template search tool' and is not yet capable of generating designs directly within ChatGPT. He then introduces his 'personal favorite,' the 'Screenshot to Code GPT,' demonstrating its functionality by uploading a screenshot of Shopify's pricing page, which the GPT swiftly processes to generate clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code without requiring any specific prompts. The Man in Studio highlights this GPT's ability to bypass previous issues with partial code or errors, explaining that the generated HTML and CSS can be easily copied into website builders like Wix, Squarespace, or WordPress via their 'add custom code' function, enabling customization without coding knowledge. A close-up of hands typing on a laptop keyboard and logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform illustrate the code's versatility, with a live preview rendering the Shopify pricing cards accurately styled and laid out, showcasing the seamless conversion from screenshot to functional web content.

ChatGPT GPTs Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar and categories. In this segment, it displays the 'Screenshot to Code GPT' interface, which the Man in Studio describes as a tool that bypasses previous coding errors, efficiently converting website screenshots into clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, displayed in the chat window for easy integration into various website builders.

Invideo AI Platform.description: A dark-themed video creation platform with a central 'Idea to Video' section, featuring an astronaut graphic and options to 'Join with Google', 'Join with Apple', or 'Continue with email'. The platform displays a video generation progress bar, a workspace selection screen, and a video editor with a timeline, playback controls, and options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate'. The video preview shows abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark, which the Man in Studio explains is royalty-free stock footage used by the platform, and that the video is fully editable with options to remove the watermark via a paid subscription.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He has a clear, confident male voice with an American accent, providing detailed explanations and instructions on the GPT's functionality and utility throughout the segment.

Screenshot to Code GPT.description: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a stylized 'S' and 'C'. The Man in Studio highlights its ability to process a Shopify pricing page screenshot and output corresponding clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is then shown to be easily adaptable for website customization without requiring coding expertise.

Laptop Typing Scene.description: A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code. The desk includes a coffee cup, a mouse, and a smartphone, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing in the corner, indicating the tool's compatibility with various platforms. The scene visually supports the Man in Studio's narration about copying and pasting the generated code.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a screen recording of the Invideo AI Platform, displaying a video titled 'Understanding Generative AI: A Guide for High School Students' undergoing processing. A man, identified as the Man in Studio, appears in a circular overlay, explaining in a clear male voice that the platform utilizes "Storyblocks, which is royalty-free," for stock videos and voiceover narration. He emphasizes that the video is "fully editable," allowing modifications to the script, selections, and voiceover, or even uploading personal media before exporting. He notes that a paid subscription can remove the 'Storyblocks' watermark visible on the abstract AI-themed visuals. The scene then transitions to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, where a search for 'Invideo AI' reveals related GPTs like 'Video AI by Invideo'. The Man in Studio then appears full-screen in a studio setting with blue lighting and shelves, gesturing expressively as he continues his explanation. He introduces "Zapier, this one Automation Consultant by Zapier is really useful," detailing its role in creating automations for custom GPTs. The video cuts back to the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, now showcasing the 'Automation Consultant by Zapier' GPT with sample prompts. The Man in Studio reappears, continuing to describe Zapier as an "automation consultant" that provides "ton of good ideas." The interface then displays a search for 'Canva', listing GPTs like 'Canva' by canva.com, as the Man in Studio begins to mention that "Canva has over 100..." before the segment concludes.

The video opens with a close-up of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, displaying a search for 'canva' which reveals several related GPTs, including 'Canva' by canva.com. The Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaks directly to the camera, explaining that while the Canva GPT allows "thousands of messages," it's "not quite there yet," primarily serving as a "way to find templates" and "links to Canva." He clarifies that he initially expected it to "generate all kinds of different designs" within ChatGPT, but it functions more as a "template tool or a template search tool," making it "worth a look at if you want to speed up the process of finding templates." He then states he "did not include it on the list" until it could truly create designs. The scene transitions to a title card introducing his "personal favorite," the 'Screenshot to Code GPT'. The interface for this GPT appears, prompting for a screenshot upload. The Man in Studio, now visible in a circular overlay, elaborates, suggesting one could take a screenshot of a website like Shopify's pricing page if they liked its layout. A screenshot of the Shopify pricing page is then uploaded, and the 'Screenshot to Code GPT' processes it, swiftly generating clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code in the chat window. He emphasizes the simplicity, stating, "All I have to do is take a screenshot and come over here and I just have to upload that. I don't have to give it a single prompt," contrasting its ease with ChatGPT's vision capabilities, which he notes "never had a good time."

The video opens with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera with a clear, confident American accent and expressive hand gestures. He introduces the 'Screenshot to Code GPT', explaining how it successfully bypasses previous issues of partial code or errors encountered with other tools. The scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed ChatGPT GPTs Interface, demonstrating the 'Screenshot to Code GPT'. A Shopify pricing page screenshot is uploaded, and the GPT efficiently processes it, generating clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is displayed in the chat window. The Man in Studio reappears, reinforcing the GPT's capabilities and explaining that this basic HTML and CSS code can be easily copied and pasted into website builders like Wix, Squarespace, or WordPress using their 'add custom code' function, eliminating the need to understand the code itself. A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, displaying code, further illustrates this process, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing to highlight the code's versatility. The ChatGPT interface then shows the complete generated code, including HTML structure, Tailwind classes, and a script tag. The Man in Studio emphasizes the tool's utility for anyone wanting to customize a website without coding knowledge. Finally, a live preview of the generated code renders the Shopify pricing cards on a webpage with accurate styling and layout, demonstrating the seamless conversion from screenshot to functional, customizable web content, as the Man in Studio concludes his remarks, noting that 'everything else, it got pretty...'.

event_blocks.summary: The Man in Studio, dressed in a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, begins by speaking directly to the camera from behind a microphone in a dimly lit studio, stating, "Not bad without doing any actual coding." He then announces the release of their "complete custom GPT course," transitioning to a screen recording of the dark-themed SkillLeap AI course interface. From a circular overlay, the Man in Studio explains the course, featuring "a little over 20 different videos," aims to take "custom GPTs to the next level." The interface displays thumbnails like 'COMPLETE CUSTOM GPT COURSE' and 'MASTERING DALL·E 3'. The view zooms into the 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs' outline, showing sections such as 'SECTION 1.1 INTRODUCTION TO GPTS' and 'SECTION 2.4 10 GPT ACTIONS WITH ZAPIER'. The cursor highlights 'SECTION 3.1 ADDING GPT WITH BOTPRESS P1' and 'SECTION 4.1 GPT STORE INTRODUCTION' as the speaker discusses automating GPTs with "Zapier actions" and integrating them into websites using "Botpress," noting the use of the "OpenAI API." The Man in Studio briefly reappears, gesturing with his right hand, before the screen returns to the course interface, showing the description for 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs'. He explains that the course is accessible through a "SkillLeap AI" subscription, which includes "all these courses," with "two to three new courses every single month" for "one subscription price with a free trial." The video returns to the course thumbnails with the Man in Studio's overlay, concluding with a 'Link In Description' text overlay. He finishes by saying, "good fit for you. So I'll link that below. If you have a favorite custom GPT, let me know in the comment section so I could check it out and I'll see you next time," using expressive hand gestures, including an open palm and a thumbs-up.

SkillLeap AI Course Interface.description: A dark-themed web interface for the SkillLeap AI platform, hosting online courses like 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs'. It features a grid of course thumbnails with yellow banners and instructor images, and detailed section outlines with numbered sub-sections, including topics like Zapier actions, Botpress integration, and the GPT store. The interface, which the speaker notes contains over 20 videos and is part of a subscription offering monthly new courses, also displays navigation elements like 'Continue watching', 'Add to Favorites', and 'Share', along with a course description emphasizing personalized AI for business.

Man in Studio.description: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, providing commentary on the GPTs being demonstrated. He speaks with a clear, conversational voice, delivering concluding remarks and a call to action.

raw_segments: The video opens with the Man in Studio, wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, speaking directly to the camera from behind a microphone, gesturing expressively as he states, "Not bad without doing any actual coding." He then introduces, "And we just released our complete custom GPT course," as the scene transitions to a screen recording of the dark-themed SkillLeap AI course interface. The Man in Studio continues his clear and informative narration from a circular overlay in the top-left, explaining that the course, which contains "a little over 20 different videos," will take "custom GPTs to the next level." The interface displays a grid of course thumbnails, including 'COMPLETE CUSTOM GPT COURSE' and 'MASTERING DALL·E 3', each with a yellow banner. The view zooms into the detailed course outline for 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs', showing sections like 'SECTION 1.1 INTRODUCTION TO GPTS' and 'SECTION 2.4 10 GPT ACTIONS WITH ZAPIER'. The cursor scrolls, highlighting sections such as 'SECTION 3.1 ADDING GPT WITH BOTPRESS P1' and 'SECTION 4.1 GPT STORE INTRODUCTION', as the speaker elaborates on automating GPTs using "Zapier actions" and adding them to websites with "Botpress," noting it uses "OpenAI API." The Man in Studio briefly reappears in a live shot, gesturing with his right hand, before the screen returns to the course interface, now showing the top of the 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs' page with its description. He explains that the course is available when signing up for "SkillLeap AI," which provides access to "all these courses," including "course number 20," with "two to three new courses every single month" for "one subscription price with a free trial." The video cycles back to the grid of course thumbnails with the Man in Studio’s overlay, concluding with a 'Link In Description' text overlay.

The video opens with a medium close-up of the Man in Studio, seated in a dimly lit, modern studio environment with a blue-toned backdrop. He wears a black polo shirt and a gray baseball cap, speaking directly into a professional black microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him, a dark shelving unit displays various tech items, including a white audio interface, a pair of headphones, and a sand timer, while two framed blue certificates or awards hang on the wall. As he speaks with a clear, conversational voice, he delivers his concluding remarks, stating, "good fit for you. So I'll link that below. If you have a favorite custom GPT, let me know in the comment section so I could check it out and I'll see you next time." Throughout his speech, he uses expressive hand gestures, raising his right hand with an open palm before transitioning to a thumbs-up gesture, emphasizing his points with engaged and animated facial expressions, creating a professional and enthusiastic atmosphere typical of a tech or educational vlog.

global_entity_library.GPT Finder Configuration Page: A ChatGPT interface showing the 'GPT Finder' setup with uploaded PDF files under 'Knowledge', a 'Preview' section with sample prompts, and a 'Capabilities' section. The Man in Studio refers to this as "GPT Finder" while explaining that the GPTs presented are hand-picked and tested for usefulness.
global_entity_library.Google Sheets Document: A spreadsheet titled 'GPT Directory Programming' by skillleap.ai, listing various GPTs with columns for GPT Name, Icon, Category, Description, and Link, displayed in a browser window. The man refers to this as 'this entire document' and his 'knowledge base,' containing the top GPTs in all kinds of different categories.
global_entity_library.Man in Studio: A man wearing a black polo shirt and gray baseball cap, seated in front of a microphone, speaking directly to the camera with expressive hand gestures. He appears in both live shots and as a circular overlay during screen recordings, providing commentary on the GPTs being demonstrated. He speaks with a clear, conversational voice, delivering concluding remarks and a call to action.
global_entity_library.ChatGPT GPTs Interface: A dark-themed web interface for discovering and creating custom GPTs, featuring a search bar and categories. In this segment, it displays the 'Screenshot to Code GPT' interface, which the Man in Studio describes as a tool that bypasses previous coding errors, efficiently converting website screenshots into clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, displayed in the chat window for easy integration into various website builders.
global_entity_library.Presentation Preview: A browser-based presentation editor displaying slides with titles like 'Introduction to Generative AI' and 'How Do Generative AI Work?', featuring a clean, modern design with blue and gray color accents, which the Man in Studio demonstrates can be edited, converted to audio, and downloaded as a PowerPoint.
global_entity_library.Doc Maker GPT Interface: A specialized ChatGPT interface for creating documents, presentations, and spreadsheets, featuring a blue document icon, a description of its capabilities (Document Creation, Presentations, Spreadsheets, Data Analysis), and a text input field for user prompts. The Man in Studio describes this GPT as a tool capable of creating PDFs, documents, and PowerPoints, emphasizing its utility for builders to clearly communicate its functions.
global_entity_library.Prompt Perfect GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a colorful circular icon with a stylized 'P', described by the Man in Studio as a tool designed to enhance and refine user prompts for AI image generation tools like DALL·E by adding necessary details and structure, making it ideal for new users.
global_entity_library.Super Describe GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a red circular icon with a stylized 'S', designed to generate detailed image prompts from uploaded photos using DALL·E 3, as demonstrated by the Man in Studio uploading an architectural photo and receiving a detailed textual description.
global_entity_library.Logo Creator GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'L', designed to generate logo designs based on user preferences and company details, which the Man in Studio critiques for its text generation capabilities and offers usage advice for.
global_entity_library.Creative Writing Coach: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a blue circular icon with a stylized 'C', designed to provide feedback on creative writing and help improve writing skills. The Man in Studio's voice highlights its effectiveness in giving tailored feedback for creative writing.
global_entity_library.Convert Anything: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a document and arrow symbol, designed to convert various file types. It is shown handling a PNG to JPEG conversion, providing a download link upon completion, and displaying Python code for the conversion process, which the Man in Studio explains is generated by a 'code interpreter' working in the background.
global_entity_library.Diagrams: Show Me: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a diagram symbol, designed to generate and display various types of diagrams. The Man in Studio highlights that it has over 25,000 chats, was a 'favorite plugin,' and is now a custom GPT, designed to create simple diagrams for visual learners, useful for teaching, and particularly good for mind maps, offering a quick AI-powered alternative to other tools. It showcases examples of Mermaid and PlantUML sequence diagrams, mindmaps, and entity relationship diagrams, with clear visual representations and labels for each type.
global_entity_library.Invideo AI Platform: A dark-themed video creation platform with a central 'Idea to Video' section, featuring an astronaut graphic and options to 'Join with Google', 'Join with Apple', or 'Continue with email'. The platform displays a video generation progress bar, a workspace selection screen, and a video editor with a timeline, playback controls, and options like 'Edit', 'Export', and 'Generate'. The video preview shows abstract AI-themed visuals with a 'Storyblocks' watermark, which the Man in Studio explains is royalty-free stock footage used by the platform, and that the video is fully editable with options to remove the watermark via a paid subscription.
global_entity_library.Screenshot to Code GPT: A custom GPT within the ChatGPT GPTs Interface, identified by a circular icon with a stylized 'S' and 'C'. The Man in Studio highlights its ability to process a Shopify pricing page screenshot and output corresponding clean HTML, Tailwind, and JS code, which is then shown to be easily adaptable for website customization without requiring coding expertise.
global_entity_library.Laptop Typing Scene: A close-up shot of hands typing on a laptop keyboard, with the screen displaying code. The desk includes a coffee cup, a mouse, and a smartphone, with logos for Wix, WordPress, and another platform appearing in the corner, indicating the tool's compatibility with various platforms. The scene visually supports the Man in Studio's narration about copying and pasting the generated code.
global_entity_library.SkillLeap AI Course Interface: A dark-themed web interface for the SkillLeap AI platform, hosting online courses like 'Custom GPTs For Entrepreneurs'. It features a grid of course thumbnails with yellow banners and instructor images, and detailed section outlines with numbered sub-sections, including topics like Zapier actions, Botpress integration, and the GPT store. The interface, which the speaker notes contains over 20 videos and is part of a subscription offering monthly new courses, also displays navigation elements like 'Continue watching', 'Add to Favorites', and 'Share', along with a course description emphasizing personalized AI for business.
